forest-e2.title: Mossy Trail Bend
text: A narrow trail curves here, softened by deep green moss.
The air smells damp and old.
An ancient tree looms over the path, its bark folded like leather.

tree.text: The bark is carved with symbols too worn to read. Something has been here a long time.

symbols.text: Strange markings. Not a language you recognise. But they feel intentional.

moss.text: Thick and soft. You could sleep on it. Something already did — there's a faint impression.

twig.roomText: A dry twig lies half-buried in the moss.
